data.content:
Here's a summary of the new IPO listings this year (2026):

**Confirmed IPOs in 2026:**
1. **Swarmer, Inc. (SWMR)** - Technology, priced March 17, 2026 at $5.00/share
2. **MiniMed Group, Inc. (MMED)** - Health Care, priced March 6, 2026 at $20.00/share
3. **Arxis, Inc. (ARXS)** - Other, priced April 16, 2026 at $28.00/share
4. **Aevex Corp. (AVEX)** - Other, priced April 17, 2026 at $20.00/share
5. **PSUS/PS** - Financials, priced April 29, 2026 at $50.00/share
6. **HawkEye 360, Inc. (HAWK)** - Technology, priced May 7, 2026 at $26.00/share
7. **Cerebras Systems (CBRS)** - Technology, priced May 14, 2026 at $30.00/share

**Major companies expected to IPO in 2026:**
- SpaceX (valuation: $1.75 trillion - $2 trillion)
- Databricks (valuation: $134 billion)
- OpenAI (valuation: $852 billion - $1 trillion)
- Animoca Brands
- BitGo
- Cohesity
- Consensys Systems
- Kraken
- Lambda Labs
- Motive Technologies
- Strava
- Upgrade
- Wealthfront

**Other notable listings:**
- INSPACE CREATION BERHAD (Bursa Malaysia, April 2026)
- Various upcoming IPOs listed by Renaissance Capital including Deep Fission, ERock, Parabilis Medicines, WhiteHawk Minerals, Forbright

The market has seen a resurgence after a multi-year lull, with both tech and AI-driven companies leading the IPO market, while investors appear willing to accept short-term unprofitability in pursuit of durable growth.

# New IPOs in 2026 — Research Summary

## Already Priced IPOs (Through April/May 2026)

The following IPOs have recently priced according to market data:

| Company | Ticker | Date | Price | Industry |
|---------|--------|------|-------|----------|
| **MiniMed Group, Inc.** | MMED | 3/6/2026 | $20.00 | Health Care |
| **Swarmer, Inc.** | SWMR | 3/17/2026 | $5.00 | Technology |
| **Arxis, Inc.** | ARXS | 4/16/2026 | $28.00 | Other |
| **Aevex Corp.** | AVEX | 4/17/2026 | $20.00 | Other |
| **Pershing Square USA** | PSUS/PS | 4/29/2026 | $50.00 | Financials |
| **HawkEye 360, Inc.** | HAWK | 5/7/2026 | $16.00 | Technology |
| **Cerebras** | CBRS | 5/14/2026 | 30.0 | Technology |

Source: [IPOScoop 2026 Pricings](https://www.iposcoop.com/current-year-pricings)

---

## Upcoming IPOs This Week (6/1/2026)

According to Renaissance Capital's IPO calendar, these stocks are scheduled to trade beginning 6/1/2026:

| Company | Ticker | Estimated Raise | Lead Underwriters |
|---------|--------|----------------|-------------------|
| **SpaceX** | SPCX | $75,000 | Goldman, Morgan Stanley |
| **ERock** | EROC | $600 | Morgan Stanley, JP Morgan |
| **Parabilis Medicines** | PBLS | $450 | Leerink Partners, BofA |
| **WhiteHawk Minerals** | WHK | $180 | Raymond James, Stifel |
| **Forbright** | FRBT | $150 | Goldman, JP Morgan |

Source: [Renaissance Capital IPO Calendar 2026](https://www.renaissancecapital.com/IPO-Center/Calendar)

---

## Major Tech & AI IPOs Expected in 2026

Several high-profile companies have signaled plans to go public in 2026:

| Company | Sector | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| **SpaceX** | Aerospace | Valuation estimated at $1.75T–$2T (U.S. News); launching 6/1/2026 |
| **Databricks** | Cloud/AI | Estimated valuation $134 billion |
| **OpenAI** | AI | Estimated valuation $852B–$1T |
| **Cohesity** | AI Security | CEO stated October 2025 round "likely last ahead of IPO" |
| **Consensys Systems** | Blockchain |
| **Kraken** | Crypto Exchange |
| **Motive Technologies** | Automotive Tech |
| **Upgrade** | Fintech |
| **Wealthfront** | Fintech |
| **Strava** | Social/Health Tech |

Source: [EquityZen 2026 IPO Outlook](https://blog.equityzen.com/equityzens-2026-ipo-outlook) | [U.S. News Money](https://money.usnews.com/investing/articles/new-and-upcoming-ipos-in-2026)

---

## Key Observations

1. **Technology and AI dominate** — Most anticipated IPOs are in technology, AI, and fintech sectors.
2. **Record valuations expected** — SpaceX's estimated $1.75T–$2T valuation would make it the most valuable IPO of 2026 by a significant margin.
3. **IPO market reopening** — After a multi-year lull, the IPO window re-opened in 2026 with high-profile tech and AI-driven companies leading the wave.
4. **Seven major IPOs from 2025's list** — Chime, Coreweave, eToro, Klarna, MNTN, Netskope, and Stubhub went public in 2025.

---

## Cautionary Note

Investors should note that some of the "expected" IPOs (like SpaceX, Databricks, OpenAI) are currently listed as estimates rather than confirmed listings. Always verify with official prospectus filings before investing. The valuation figures shown are market estimates and should not be treated as guaranteed values.
